generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex in guarantee expressions
Align helper declaration type with the expression in comparisons and assignments
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE scalar declaration types are int, real, and bool
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation contracts
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references that are absent from the analyzed model and its configured dependencies
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: Compact requirement semantics and model traceability
